name: The Quad
overview: Dr. Eva Fletcher is the newly-elected President of the fictional Georgia A&M University. Upon arriving, Eva is charged with saving the prestigious HBCU from bankruptcy and her twenty-year marriage from crumbling while managing a tumultuous relationship with her rebellious only daughter. A diverse group of freshmen also promises to keep Eva's hands full.

trailers.title: First Look at Anika Noni Rose in BET's new drama series 'The Quad' (Trailer) #TheQuad
